breaking.summary: 2 teenagers missing in Bijnor river; 3 injured as Mirzapur road caved-in

breaking.title: Wildfire in southern Spain leaves at least 12 dead and 23 missing
breaking.summary: A local official said four of the victims may be British after a fire broke out near Los Gallardos, Almería.

breaking.title: Four alleged gangsters killed in gunfight with police in Gurugram
breaking.summary: The gang was planning to target the house of businessman to whom they had made several extortion calls, say police; one gang member critically injured, three police personnel wounded

breaking.title: Three held in Greece over deadly bomb attacks targeting ruling party politicians
breaking.summary: Greece's anti-terrorism forces have taken swift action, detaining three individuals believed to be behind a wave of firebomb assaults targeting members of the ruling New Democracy party. Among the attacks was a tragic explosion in Thessaloniki, which claimed the life of a parliamentary candidate's mother. These arrests not only demonstrate the government's resolve to seek justice but also underscore Greece's challenging history with political extremism.

breaking.title: 2 Women Killed, 16 Injured After School Bus Hits Tractor-Trolley In UP
breaking.summary: According to eyewitnesses, the collision caused the tractor-trolley to overturn.

breaking.title: Opinion: Opinion | US-Iran MoU Collapse: Why The Strait Of Hormuz Is Back On The Brink
breaking.summary: Why did the ceasefire fail? Could it have been prevented? The answer to many of these questions lies in the framing of the 14-Point MoU and the uneven playfield that it created.

breaking.title: Iran has asked to continue talks, and the U.S. agreed, Trump says
breaking.summary: The two nations reached an interim deal last month to end ‌a four-month conflict that has throttled worldwide energy supplies

breaking.title: 5 things you probably didn’t know about Erling Haaland, the Viking striker who helped Norway make FIFA World Cup history
breaking.summary: Erling Haaland is making headlines as he propels Norway to an unforgettable World Cup quarter-final by scoring seven goals. Born in England but raised in Norway, his unique background sparks conversations. Haaland, an advocate for social justice, has a notable online presence. Football runs in his blood, as his father was a pro player, and he famously dabbled in rap.
